sglang.title: [Lint] Fix `Optional[X] = (None,)` typo defaults in two dataclasses
sglang.author: alphabetc1
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
A trailing comma in a dataclass field default silently turns None into the 1-tuple (None,) — Python parses x: T = None, the same as x: T = (None,). Both are falsy, so the wrong value can sit there unnoticed until something iterates the field.
None of the four sites here actually exercise the

What
Add a call-pr-test-extra job to pr-test.yml that fires only on schedule events and invokes pr-test-extra.yml via workflow_call with run_all_tests: true.
call-pr-test-extra:
  if: github.event_name == 'schedule'
  uses: ./.github/workflows/pr-test-extra.yml
  with:
    run_all_tests: true

sglang.title: [Llama4] Use strided in-place fused QK RMSNorm to drop a redundant copy
sglang.author: kevin85421
sglang.bodyExcerpt: The qk_norm block reshape-then-contiguous() was forcing a copy because qk is a strided slice of the qkv buffer. Switch the CUDA path to apply_qk_norm, which calls the JIT fused_inplace_qknorm kernel — its TensorMatcher accepts arbitrary outer strides, so it reads/writes the qkv buffer in-place via t

sglang.title: perf(mla): hybrid Triton fused cat+FP8-quantize for MLA chunked-prefill K/V
sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The MLA chunked-prefill path packs strided k_nope and broadcast k_pe into a contiguous K tensor and (in the FP8 path) FP8-quantizes K and V. The straightforward implementation is three sequential ops (concat + 2× per-tensor FP8 quantize), which dispatches the same (s, num_heads) work thre

Three writes of the form self.X = expr on TokenizerManager and
ModelRunner where the resulting attribute has no reader anywhere in
the codebase. Converting to function-scope locals makes the lifetime
explicit and prevents future "is this attribute available?" guards
from spreading.


managers/tokeni

self.can_run_list = can_run_list
self.running_bs = len(self.running_batch.reqs)

Originally

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
SM121 (DGX Spark GB10) shares the same FP8 MMA capabilities as SM120 (RTX 5090) — both support native mma.sync.aligned.m16n8k32.row.col.f32.e4m3.e4m3.f32. However, SM121 is excluded from all Marlin and CUTLASS FP8 codepaths by exact-match arch guards (== 120, in [89, 120], enable_sm120_only)

vllm.title: [ROCm][Bugfix] Fix fused_mla_dual_rms_norm for AITER API rename _fused_qk_rmsnorm
vllm.author: rbrugaro-amd
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
AITER PR #2958 renamed the public fused_qk_rmsnorm  to the private _fused_qk_rmsnorm and prepended q_out/k_out output-buffer parameters.  This breaks vLLM's MLA dual RMS norm fusion pass at runtime with an ImportError when running against the updated AITER.
Changes:

check_aiter_fused_qk_rmsnorm():

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix layerwise reload alias-buffer corruption
vllm.author: rasdani
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fix layerwise reload corrupting non-persistent buffers that alias checkpoint-loaded
parameters.
Layerwise reload records a module's parameters and buffers before restoring the
module to meta tensors, then materializes and copies processed tensors back into
the original kernel tensor storage.

The V2 path in vllm/v1/worker/gpu/eplb_utils.py (added in #

Supported backends: auto, cutlass, flashinfer_cutlass, flashinfer_trtllm, flashinfer_cudnn, marlin, triton, dee

benchmarks/benchmark_serving_structured_output.py currently measures structured-output serving workloads, but it does not provide a way to add a shared prompt prefix across requests.
This makes it harder to benchmark structured-output workloads that also exercise prefix-cache behavior or lon

vllm.title: fix: add API key authorization to /v2 endpoints
vllm.author: dusthunter
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The AuthenticationMiddleware only checked paths starting with /v1, allowing /v2 endpoints (e.g. /v2/embed, /v2/rerank) to bypass authentication entirely.
This is a security vulnerability: any user can call /v2 endpoints without providing a valid API key, even when --api-key is configured.

Update pa
